svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="h6m8jt7auTGTdstGBU3Q"> <mxGraphModel dx="896" dy="465" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Frontend Web App
(Browser)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="FastAPI Backend
(Hugging Face Space)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="260" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value=".eml Parser
Extract email content" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="270" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Spam Ensemble
RoBERTa + ELECTRA
Ham / Spam / Maybe" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="130" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Emotion Ensemble
RoBERTa + ELECTRA + DeBERTa
Multi-label detection" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="390" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d0cee2;strokeColor=#56517e;" value="Response Aggregator
Combine results into JSON" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="250" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Frontend Visualization
Spam + Emotion Results" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="260" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-8" edge="1" parent="1" source="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-9" edge="1" parent="1" source="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-10" edge="1" parent="1" source="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-11" edge="1" parent="1" source="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-12" edge="1" parent="1" source="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-4" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-13" edge="1" parent="1" source="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" target="45-edOPAPtygdGOXAgaT-7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
